svg.title: Console — Zane Wang's terminal session profile
svg.desc: A continuous terminal-window profile composed as one tmux session with 8 sections: hero, projects, fleet, stats, snake heatmap, stack, philosophy, sidekick. Stats and snake refresh nightly via cron.

g.text: AI agents · agent memory · maps · hardware-aware software · developer tools
"I build useful systems for fuzzy problems —
agents that remember, maps that explain, tools that remove friction,
and prototypes with enough personality to make the demo worth finishing."
# click any row above on github.com to open the repo
# 7 specialists, one constellation. routes work to the right process.
activity by event type, last 100 events:
# refresh: nightly via .github/workflows/refresh-stats.yml. cadence over count.
# snake eats the contribution graph; daily, on cron, committed to the output branch.
# 5 directories, 12 leaves. tool fit over logo walls.
# Operating doctrine — partial extract. Run "man agent-dao" for the full set.
consolidate what overlaps; simplify what is tangled.
never defend a position; update it.
Open an issue with title prefix
A workflow runs Claude-class model and replies in your issue (~30s).
Limit: 3 questions per 24h per handle. 50 globally per 24h.
a question about Zane's work, stack, philosophy
your GitHub handle in, one specific overlap angle out
a few topics in, one useful-strange prototype idea out
